contextBuilder.description: Character sheet _prepareContext should build ctx.psychicPanel for BC actors. The persisted state lives on system; mode and pushLevel are ephemeral UI state (not persisted), so a per-sheet ephemeral slot is required — store the current selections on the sheet instance (e.g. _bcPsyMode / _bcPsyPushLevel) and surface them into ctx.psychicPanel each render. Resolver inputs are taken from sys.psyRating, sys.psykerClass, sys.sustainedPowerCount; resolver outputs (effectivePR / sustainPenalty / phenomenaRolls) are read from resolvePsychicTest(...). Pseudocode:
pseudocode: import { maxPushLevel, resolvePsychicTest, type PsyMode } from '../rules/bc-psychic-strength.ts';
const resolved = resolvePsychicTest({ psykerClass, basePR: psyRating, mode, pushLevel, sustainedPowerCount });

Note: the panel emits data-action="bcPsychicSetMode" / data-action="bcPsychicSetPushLevel" on the mode select and push slider so the orchestrator can wire ephemeral writes into this._bcPsyMode / this._bcPsyPushLevel via a 'change' listener; these are optional convenience actions and are not required for the primary 'bcPsychicTest' flow (which prompts for mode + push level in its own dialog).
